title: dryopteris × complexa subsp. inconspicua
intro: Dryopteris × complexa subsp. inconspicua, also known as the hybrid autumn fern, is a hybrid species of flowering plant in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dryopteris × complexa subsp. inconspicua include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep, and protect against cell damage. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine.
